programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: Okinawa Rendez-vous
programme.desc: Jenny wakes up and decides to leave her lover Sato, a triad boss. She takes Sato's ransom money to Tang, who has a diary with explicit details of Sato's triad activities.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: Jeffery is a hired killer who blinds a singer Jennie during his last job. Feeling guilty, he picks a contract to kill a head of a drug syndicate to pay for her eye operation...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Michael Wong
programme.desc: Michael Wong rose to prominence on the big screen in the 80s with his “half Chinese, half foreign' identity and eye-catching appearance, from the early rebellious and unruly big boy to the tough and strong policeman role later. Looking back the bygone days, he barely knew Cantonese but was fortunate to meet a like-minded partner who helped him through the break-in period, and which film from his decades-long career impressed him the most? After played countless roles, how does he feel about his identity as an actor?

programme.title: NIGHT LIFE HERO
programme.desc: Zhan's family was very rich, but his wife died early. He and his daughter Baby depended on each other. Zhan liked dancing in nightclub which his daughter opposed. Therefore, she dressed up to work in the nightclub in order to make her dad mad. A gangster had an interest in Baby, but fortunately Cong came forward to help. Baby and Cong developed feelings for each other. Baby used her wealth to help Cong with his career, but when Cong found out that his career was helped by Baby secretly, it was difficult for him to accept. How should Cong decide?

programme.title: Gambling Queen
programme.desc: Nan, a gambling goddess from Mainland China who is smart and has extraordinary martial arts skills. She comes to Hong Kong alone to find her cousin Bao who lives there. Her target: a crooked investor and card shark extraordinaire. When Nan's underhanded opponent proves too much to handle on her own, she enlists the aid of some rather unusual helpers, including an overconfident casino playboy, a disastrously awkward stuntman, and a perky martial arts princess. Pooling their various talents, Nan concocts a crazy scheme to take down her adversary that is destined to go down in gambling history.

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: Who's The Woman, Who's The Man
programme.desc: With the help of her lover, Sam, Wing impersonated a male image and became a pop singer. But Fong Yim Mui wrecked the relationship when they both had an affair with her...

programme.title: E5 - Rocky Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: Rob Nelson examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts.

programme.title: E20 - Small Bolts, Neon Signs, Ambulance Bodies And Bobbleheads
programme.desc: Factories make bolts that are strong enough to hold up a building, create bright colors for neon signs and design bobbleheads with three-dimensional printers.

programme.title: E20 - Small Bolts, Neon Signs, Ambulance Bodies And Bobbleheads
programme.desc: Factories make bolts that are strong enough to hold up a building, create bright colors for neon signs and design bobbleheads with three-dimensional printers.

programme.title: E8 - Goddess Face Tumour
programme.desc: Laxmi, from India, was born with a huge facial tumour giving her the appearance of the Hindu god Ganesh. Can surgeons save her face?

programme.title: E6 - Movie Monsters
programme.desc: Mark and the team target rude theatregoers who disrupt the film on their mobile phones. Then they target lazy patrons with their ruthless trash bot.

E24 - Moon
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: E23 - Cake
programme.desc: Hattie needs help to bake a cake - and Stan's on his way! No challenge is too small or too unusual, and Stan's always happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: E8 - I Can Run A Million Fast
programme.desc: From lions that love to climb to meerkats who play golf, the funny animals talk about all the brilliant stuff they love to do to keep active.

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: E4 - What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: E2 - Gooseberry
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.title: E37 - Peas And Quiet
programme.desc: There are odd noises in the supermarket. Supertato discovers that Evil Pea and the Mini Peas are asleep and walking through the supermarket. Supertato tries to get them back to bed.

programme.title: E80 - Fast Slow Fast Slow
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take it in turns to go up and down on the Dup Dup. Sometimes they go fast and sometimes they go slow - even The Noo---noo has a turn!

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E16 - Mariana Trench: The Pacific Ocean
programme.desc: With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger.

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E21 - Tepui Mountains, Venezuela
programme.desc: Xuli and Glitch need rescuing from a sinkhole.

Premier League 25/26 -Burnley vs Brighton & Hove Albion
E13 - Sandra Benhamou/Pelagia Kolotouros/Marie-Cecile Kfouri
programme.desc: In the heart of Brittany, visit the Pont-Aven museum. Interior design and a passion for cinema come together in Sandra Benhamou's world. Lacoste reinvents itself under the leadership of Pelagia Kolotouros. Patient and meticulous, restorer Marie-Cecile Kfouri brings frescoes and old canvases back to life.

programme.title: E13 - Vegetable Mille-Feuille
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Benoit Garnier, director of the Nogent Cutlery Museum, into her kitchen. He concocts a recipe that combines his love of Italian gastronomy with that of his homeland: a vegetable mille-feuille with langres cheese.

programme.title: E10 - Gregoire Wolinski/Sponge Cities/Chatelaison Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Gregoire Wolinski, world aquascaping champion; the end of soil artificialisation thanks to sponge towns; Manoir de Chatelaison gardens; Don't panic with Caroline and Alexandre.

programme.title: E25 - Metamorphosis Of A Very Small House In Brussels
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Woluwe-Saint-Pierre to discover the complete metamorphosis of a small terraced house.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E3 - Homes
programme.desc: Join us as we take a look at a world of different luxuries each week. In this episode, we get to peek inside the world's most luxurious homes.

programme.desc: Gemini and James had it all planned out when they bought their three-bed home in Surrey. Expecting a new baby, they would move in and do the place up.

programme.desc: It's the semi final in the Bake Off shed and what better way to celebrate than by baking for a party. Matt and Maggie set a series of party-themed challenges that will decide a place in the final.

programme.title: E4 - Fish
programme.desc: Award winning chef Jason Atherton continues his journey through Dubai at the beach, where he cooks up some delicious fish and seafood recipes inspired by this beautiful coastal city. programme.title: E13
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E5 - Girls Like US
programme.desc: Tess and Sunny must team up with Jake to solve the high profile murder of a controversial speaker on the college lecture circuit amidst campus protests. As they race to find the killer, Tess lands in hot water with Bennett and the force after Matt leaks footage of a police officer cracking down on a peaceful protester. Meanwhile, Sunny struggles with the consequences of her sleepwalking as Jake debates an intriguing offer – a promotion on a high profile undercover case, away from Major Crimes and from Tess, inadvertently drawing them closer.

programme.desc: Shock hits as Amy and Jake treat a pregnant robbery victim. Michael faces therapy with Katie, while TJ and Sonya tackle illness and romance.

programme.title: E14 - The Beautiful Ballad Of Gary Callahan
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs' early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season's devastating car crash.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Set in a palliative care ward with patients of limited life expectancy or those struggling with daily life, nurse Henmi Ayumi (Kishii Yukino) and part-time doctor Hirono Seiji (Matsuyama Kenichi) engage with patients and their families' complex situations, striving to alleviate pain and enrich their limited time to the fullest until their final moments. The story, through the characters' struggles and emotions, questions the meaning of living and facing death, illuminating hope for our future.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Under Nobunaga's orders, Koichiro is told to marry Chika (Yoshioka Riho), the daughter of Morinari. Tokichiro celebrates the match, but troubling rumors surround Chika, and she secretly carries deep resentment toward the Oda clan. Meanwhile, Nobunaga decides to wage war against the Asakura and tells Nagamasa he need only guard the rear, since his son is being held as a hostage in Asakura territory. However, once the battle begins, Nagamasa's father, Hisamasa, pressures him to side with the Asakura

programme.title: From Surplus Calf To Alpine Savior
programme.desc: For a cow to produce milk, she must give birth to a calf. Female calves later become dairy cows themselves, while male calves are surplus to the dairy industry's requirements. They're packed into trucks and suffer in transit on their way to fattening facilities.

programme.title: From Surplus Calf To Alpine Savior
programme.desc: For a cow to produce milk, she must give birth to a calf. Female calves later become dairy cows themselves, while male calves are surplus to the dairy industry's requirements. They're packed into trucks and suffer in transit on their way to fattening facilities.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. Young influencers interpret his poetry, and Lady Gaga's upper arm is adorned with a tattooed Rilke verse. He appears on calendars and even funeral notices.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: Ghana's Returnees Long Street Debate
programme.desc: In this week's show, Edith Kimani meets with Afro-Americans who have relocated to Ghana and locals to explore the challenges and opportunities sparked by the 'Year of Return'.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Women In Asia. Guardians Of Nature
programme.desc: Their stories inspire others to connect with nature. Women who are role models, leaders, educators and campaigners are paving the way for future generations. They want to share their awareness and understanding of nature with other women, tackling the lack of inclusion and representation in all outdoor spaces.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: Sudan's Civil War - The Limits Of Humanitarian Aid
programme.desc: In Sudan, the government is waging a bloody civil war against rebels. An estimated 12 million people have fled their homes, either to destinations within the country or to neighboring states. Many of them are seeking help in Chad.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: Ghana's Returnees Long Street Debate
programme.desc: In this week's show, Edith Kimani meets with Afro-Americans who have relocated to Ghana and locals to explore the challenges and opportunities sparked by the 'Year of Return'.

programme.title: Sudan's Civil War - The Limits Of Humanitarian Aid
programme.desc: In Sudan, the government is waging a bloody civil war against rebels. An estimated 12 million people have fled their homes, either to destinations within the country or to neighboring states. Many of them are seeking help in Chad.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Women In Asia. Guardians Of Nature
programme.desc: Their stories inspire others to connect with nature. Women who are role models, leaders, educators and campaigners are paving the way for future generations. They want to share their awareness and understanding of nature with other women, tackling the lack of inclusion and representation in all outdoor spaces.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. Young influencers interpret his poetry, and Lady Gaga's upper arm is adorned with a tattooed Rilke verse. He appears on calendars and even funeral notices.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E1 - Learning
programme.desc: The High Priestess decides to send Pokou to the Bali Komians to undergo seven challenges. King Ossei Toutou sets off to fight the Denkyra who want to invade Kumassi.

programme.title: Le Grand Blanc De Lambarene
programme.desc: Between World War II and Gabon's independence, the last twenty years of Dr. Albert Schweitzer, Nobel Prize winner in 1952, seen through the eyes of Koumba, a young African villager.

programme.title: E17 - A Mammoth In The Fridge
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E36 - Lina's Dream
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: E23 - Manta Ray
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo:2025-2026
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

'International Cross-Strait Critics' has different experts who will guide you from the superficial to the profound, helping you grasp the development context, deconstruct the major trends, and gain insights into new domains.

programme.title: The Movie Emperor
programme.desc: The Hong Kong movie star Lau Wai-chi misses out again on the Hong Kong film awards. He sits in his office, making short videos that pay tribute to the characters he has played over his forty-year career. But trying to regain popularity this way feels desperate and cheap. He needs to make a film again. He contacts Chinese director Lin Hao, as he wants to star in a film shot in the countryside, playing an ordinary farmer, something he has never done before. This film he thinks will help restore his career to glory. Yet he is so used to being a movie star and having a special treatment in his everyday life, that it is hard for him to connect with the people of the street or peasants, people who have a lower social status than him. Even with women, there seems to exist an impassable barrier. For his new role to be successful, he needs to learn from the villagers how they really live and speak. But they see through his arrogance and vanity – as does the crew. The big star is nobod

programme.title: Ghost Cat Anzu
programme.desc: Karin, 11 years old, finds herself abandoned by her father in a small Japanese town, where her grandfather, a monk, resides. Her grandfather asks Anzu, his jovial and helpful, although rather capricious, ghost cat, to look after her. As their spirited personalities collide, sparks fly-yet perhaps only in the beginning.

programme.title: Masquerade Night
programme.desc: An anonymous letter is delivered to the police – a warning that the killer involved in a mysterious homicide that occurred a few days ago in a condominium in Tokyo will strike again at “Masquerade Night”, the New Year's Eve countdown party held at Hotel Cortesia, Tokyo. All 500 invitees will be in costume. Everyone is a suspect. As the masked guests begin to arrive, they struggle to find a clue which will lead them to the murderer. Midnight draws near as the number of suspects increases. What is the killer's intention? Who is the informant? Will Nitta and Yamagishi be able to unveil the truth hidden behind the murderer's mask before the time limit?

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E259 -Dongji Rescue
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E139 - The Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the museum. Peppa imagines herself as a Queen in the King and Queen's room. George imagines being a big dinosaur in the Dinosaur Room.

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E406 - Dora And Diego And The Big Boy Bears! / Journey To Lizard Island
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami! // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a lost, baby lizard get home to its parents!

programme.title: E407 - The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: E613 - End Of The Holiday Part 4
programme.desc: Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but it is now time to go home. She can't wait to see Suzy and Goldie again.

programme.title: E813 - Space Mission Blaze
programme.desc: When three of Blaze's friends get launched into outer space on out-of-control jetpacks, Astronauts Blaze and AJ must blast off to save them!

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E221 - Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: E151 - Daddy's Movie Camera
programme.desc: Daddy gets a new video camera. First, Peppa shows him how to work it, and then he records Peppa being silly.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E619 - Fruit
programme.desc: It is fruit day at the supermarket, and Miss Rabbit is making fruit smoothies. Everyone is picking their favourite fruits to blend. George gets a special 'dinosaur' juice, to make him big and strong. Roar!

programme.title: E625 - The Olden Days
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy don't remember being that young but are pleased to see that they've always been best friends.

programme.title: E105 - Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: E221 - Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: E406 - Dora And Diego And The Big Boy Bears! / Journey To Lizard Island
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami! // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a lost, baby lizard get home to its parents!

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E407 - The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: E813 - Space Mission Blaze
programme.desc: When three of Blaze's friends get launched into outer space on out-of-control jetpacks, Astronauts Blaze and AJ must blast off to save them!

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Learns to Take Care of Himself!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to take care of himself! Join the family as they learn the right way to brush their teeth. When JJ gets nervous about his first trip to the dentist, TomTom & YoYo are there to show him it's not so scary! The self-care continues as the kids learn about fire drill safety with Nina & help Mom & Dad with spring cleaning by becoming 'Clean Machines'! It's a day of learning healthy habits & routines!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E3 - A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a sick trick, a spider, a bump & a fly! First, Jeff is sick, but after he recovers, he misses the attention & pretends he's still unwell! Then, Fuse is woken up by spooky noises in the night & must put on a brave face for Lulu to investigate. His bravery is tested again when he finds a spider in his gym & doesn't know how to get it out. The chaos ends when Pogo can't sleep & has to deal with a very noisy fly!

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E5 - Einstein Rules
programme.desc: Come full circle as the dry season descends and the Waterfront Pride enjoys good hunting and renewed confidence in their territory. Then celebrate the success of former outsider Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E8 - Rheas-Cerrado
programme.desc: Every year in the dry season, as the floodwaters disappear, the grasslands of the Pantanal are home to many species: giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rheas- the largest bird in South America.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.desc: Deep within Telangana's Reserved Forest, a passionate 25-year-old and his friends have created a school to provide education to one of India's forgotten tribes.

programme.title: E5 - Long Xuyen, An Giang
programme.desc: For the residents of the Long Xuyen floating village, life on the river is just as good as life on land.

programme.title: E1 - Surviving Prison
programme.desc: In the first episode of this three-part series, we follow six inmates as they navigate the rigors and realities of life behind bars.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

The Day Henry Met... A Statue
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Egyptian Statue in a museum. The Ancient Blue Diamond has gone missing and it's up to Statue and Henry to find it.

programme.title: Basking Shark
programme.desc: Franky has bought a gigantic new TV for the Fox household. Orla and Meabh accidentally give Fiona the fright of her life when she mistakes them for approaching sharks. And Fleabag and Plop are tremendously excited to have learned a new word - plankton.

programme.title: Origami Box
programme.desc: How can you carry stuff with a sheet of paper? See what that paper can hold with a few simple folds!

programme.title: The First Time In Forever
programme.desc: Hot off her amazing success at the Junior European Championships, artistic gymnast Amelie has been selected for the European Championships, where she will be competing as part of the senior female team.

programme.title: Well Buttered
programme.desc: Eric uses marbles to make butter out of cream. He learns how butter used to be made and how it is made today.

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: A Special Surprise
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh and Kloe are off to an important tournament. But will Kloe's injured ankle heal in time? Back in Nottingham, Kiara's dad is about to reveal a very big secret. And brothers Rais and Aren are getting competitive on the ice hockey rink.

programme.title: Neurons, Neurons, Neurons!
programme.desc: Eric learns that neurons are the brain's tiny building blocks. He does an experiment to show what they are and how they work. He is surprised to learn that giraffes have neurons that are five metres long.

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: Sometimes Gabi takes winning way too seriously. Doki wonders - does Gabi really have to win, to have fun? To find out, they set off to the ‘One of a Kind Game Kingdom' at the Silly Sports Park in Japan, where the games are as goofy as they are unique.

programme.title: Book
programme.desc: What a wonderful read! Hmm what can we do next? Oh yes leave that to Hepi and Briko.

programme.title: Antarctica Dive
programme.desc: In Antarctica, the sea ice shelf has become thinner, putting the emperor penguin colony nesting there in danger as they could fall into the water. The MeteoHeroes must find out what is going on. That is a mission for Nix and Fulmen!

programme.title: Cat Bed
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat bed.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Tree of Life
programme.desc: When a tree in the park is threatened, Yoko helps the kids understand how we are all connected to the natural world.

programme.title: The Ouch! Awards 4

programme.title: Facing Fears
programme.desc: One of the Junior Vets must confront his fear of goats, there's an emergency during surgery on a pet rabbit, and thirty-two thousand patients are waiting at a farm.

programme.title: Vanishing Into the Sunset
programme.desc: Have you noticed that some things look further away than others on a flat surface, almost as if they were about to disappear? In this episode we introduce you to the concept of 'perspective', often used by painters to provide depth to objects.

programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E8 - 尤長靖跪地連飆三段高音
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E1 - 家國情懷
programme.desc: 運用了經常出現在電影中的特效技術來拍攝，讓觀眾從不同的角度觀看，像置身於拍攝現場一樣；除了有課本上的詩詞內容外，還融入國風體育運動、美術繪畫、音樂表演等內容，利用豐富有趣的環節形式激發青少年學習傳統文化的熱情。

programme.title: E6 - Episode 3 (Part 2)
programme.desc: Orry Main, a general for the Confederacy and his best friend, Union Colonel George Hazard. The honor and friendship of two men fighting for what they believe remain steadfast through the carnage of war.

programme.title: E2 - Murder in Mesopotamia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Poirot's rehabilitative health retreat on an island resort becomes an even more stimulating mental exercise when a flirtatious film star is found strangled on a nearby beach.

programme.title: E3 - Evil Under the Sun (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Poirot is on holiday in Iraq, the wife of the head scientist at an archaeological dig confides to him that she is the target of threatening letters.

programme.desc: Things go nuclear when a Japanese Godzilla toy hits the counter. Can Corey come out on top before he's crushed? Chum does battle over a leather jacket from WWII, but will his offer bomb?

programme.title: E6 - Outlandish Ideas
programme.desc: From a coastal cleanup plan that ends with an earth-shaking surprise to a fugitive's fiery fix for an unexpected problem, these are the real-life moments when people thought way outside the box.

programme.title: E10 - Who Killed King Tut?
programme.desc: The death of one of history's most enigmatic rulers-Egypt's King Tutankhamun-remains unsolved. No one knows what ended his life, but scientific advancements may be getting us closer to the answer.

programme.desc: The families of twin sisters are “infiltrated” by a mysterious triplet, who was separated from them at birth by their adopted mother. She frames one of the twins for murdering the other's husband and then assumes the identity of the widow. Can she succeed?
